holdings.infoBox: PPH is an equity ETF with a total of 26 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 22.94%, Novartis AG ADR at 10.55%, Merck & Co. at 9.45%, Novo Nordisk at 5.59%, and Pfizer at 4.74%.

overview.description: The VanEck Pharmaceutical ETF (PPH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MVIS US Listed Pharmaceutical 25 index, a market-cap-weighted index of 25 of the largest global pharmaceutical firms. PPH was launched on Feb 1, 2000 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: Could pressure to make money faster kill the next lifesaving pill?
